title: Creamy Midnight Dessert
description: A rich and creamy dessert featuring silky texture, perfect for satisfying sweet cravings.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the heavy cream over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Remove the cream from heat and pour in the chocolate chips. Let it sit for 2-3 minutes.
Stir the mixture until the chocolate is fully melted and the mixture is smooth.
Add the granulated sugar and stir until dissolved.
Wash the midnight berries and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Spoon the creamy chocolate mixture into individual serving cups.
Top each cup with a few midnight berries.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
